allow: Bash(node -e "const registry = require\('prismarine-registry'\)\('1.21.11'\); const v = registry.version; console.log\('version:', JSON.stringify\(v\)\); console.log\('minecraftVersion:', v.minecraftVersion\); console.log\('majorVersion:', v.majorVersion\);")

Bash(node -e "const d4=require\('./blocksStates/1.21.4.json'\); const d11=require\('./blocksStates/1.21.11.json'\); console.log\('1.21.4 entries:', Object.keys\(d4\).length\); console.log\('1.21.11 entries:', Object.keys\(d11\).length\); console.log\('stone 1.21.4:', JSON.stringify\(d4.stone\).substring\(0,150\)\); console.log\('stone 1.21.11:', JSON.stringify\(d11.stone\).substring\(0,150\)\); console.log\('---'\); const sampleKey = Object.keys\(d4\).find\(k => k.includes\('torch'\)\); console.log\('torch 1.21.4:', sampleKey, JSON.stringify\(d4[sampleKey]\).substring\(0,200\)\); const sampleKey11 = Object.keys\(d11\).find\(k => k.includes\('torch'\)\); console.log\('torch 1.21.11:', sampleKey11, JSON.stringify\(d11[sampleKey11]\).substring\(0,200\)\);")
